milestones.objective: Learn the basics of Python programming

resources.title: Made With ML — Goku Mohandas
resources.why: This course provides a comprehensive introduction to Python programming

milestones.mini_project: Build a simple Python script to automate a task

resources.title: Made With ML — Goku Mohandas
resources.why: This course provides a comprehensive introduction to MLflow

checklist: Practice using MLflow to track experiments
milestones.mini_project: Use MLflow to track and compare the performance of different machine learning models

milestones.objective: Learn PyTorch and its applications in deep learning

resources.title: Best Overall Deep Learning Course for Beginners (DeepLearning.AI)
resources.why: This course provides a comprehensive introduction to deep learning with PyTorch

resources.title: PyTorch Tutorial: Deep Learning Complete Guide 2026
resources.why: This tutorial provides a detailed guide to PyTorch and its applications

checklist: Practice building and training PyTorch models
Learn about PyTorch's features and tools
milestones.mini_project: Build a PyTorch model to classify images

milestones.objective: Learn Transformers and their applications in natural language processing

resources.title: Hugging Face Transformers
resources.why: This course provides a comprehensive introduction to Transformers and their applications

resources.title: Visual Introduction to Transformers
resources.why: This article provides a visual introduction to Transformers and their applications

checklist: Practice building and training Transformer models
Learn about Transformer architectures and their applications
milestones.mini_project: Build a Transformer model to translate text

rationale: The ordering of milestones respects the prerequisite relationships between the skills. The user first needs to learn Python, then PyTorch, and finally Transformers and MLflow. This ordering allows the user to build a strong foundation in the basics before moving on to more advanced topics. The resources provided are a mix of courses, tutorials, and articles that cater to different learning styles and preferences.
